title: Telegram trigger activation failure due to rate limiting
symptom: When attempting to activate a workflow with a Telegram trigger, n8n returns 'Too Many Requests: retry after 1'. This prevents the workflow from being activated.
not_this_if: Workflow is activated without using the Telegram trigger
root_cause: Telegram imposes rate limits on how frequently requests can be made to their API. If too many requests are sent in a short period, the API responds with a rate limit error, preventing the workflow from being activated.
fix_steps: Reduce the number of Telegram triggers in your workflow to one
agent_instruction: Limit your workflow to a single Telegram trigger and attempt activation again.
